setup_pumpjack.title: Assemble a TFMG Pumpjack over an oil deposit (7-block multiblock)

subtitle.text: The ground holds more than ore.

description: Every civilization before you found it eventually.
The black seep near bedrock depth.
It looked like waste. It was the next age.
TFMG Oil Deposits generate between Y: -60 and Y: -30.
Build the Pumpjack over the deposit — 7-block multiblock.
Connect fluid pipes. The crude oil flows up.
Crude oil alone is not useful.
What you do with it is the chapter.
→ Assemble a Pumpjack over an oil deposit [check]
